name: Bank Of Travelers Rest
description_short: Bank of Travelers Rest is a South Carolina-based community bank serving customers since 1992, offering personal and business banking, loans, mortgages, and wealth management services.
description_long:
Bank of Travelers Rest is a community bank headquartered in Travelers Rest, South Carolina, that has been serving customers since October 1992. The bank is celebrating its 80th anniversary, indicating deep roots in the local community. Under the leadership of President Tom Britt, the institution emphasizes quality customer care and long-term customer relationships as core values.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of financial services including personal checking and savings accounts opened online, personal and business loan applications, mortgage services with experienced loan officers, business credit cards, cash management solutions, and wealth management services offered through Gateway Wealth Strategies. They provide identity theft protection through IDProtect, check reordering services, and access to current deposit account rates. The bank also maintains multiple customer support channels including phone lines, online chat, and email contact options.

Bank of Travelers Rest distinguishes itself through personalized service and community engagement. The bank hosts customer appreciation events, such as their mentioned 80th birthday celebration at a local ballpark. They emphasize cybersecurity education, offering resources on payment app safety and online banking security updates. The institution provides both digital banking solutions and traditional in-person branch services, catering to customers who prefer different banking methods.

As a regional community bank, Bank of Travelers Rest is best suited for customers seeking personalized service and local banking relationships rather than national chains. The bank maintains traditional banking infrastructure while investing in modern online capabilities. Customers should be aware that as a smaller regional institution, their service offerings and rates may differ from larger national banks, and service interruptions for system upgrades are possible. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking with enhanced security verification
Customer support via phone, chat, and email
pros: Online account opening available for personal checking and savings accounts
Multiple customer support channels: phone (864-834-9031 or toll-free 888-557-2265), chat, and email
Comprehensive loan services including personal loans, mortgages, and business credit cards with online application
Identity theft protection solution (IDProtect) integrated into their services
Enhanced online banking security with device verification requirements
Wealth management services available through Gateway Wealth Strategies partnership
Community engagement with customer appreciation events and local presence since 1992
cons: Planned service interruptions scheduled for May 11-13, 2026, affecting online banking and myBTRmoney
Limited information on specific rates, fees, and product terms available on main website
As a regional bank, likely higher fees or less competitive rates compared to national banks or online-only competitors
Regional availability appears limited to South Carolina area, potentially inconvenient for customers outside the region
best_for: South Carolina residents seeking personalized community banking relationships
Small business owners needing business checking, credit cards, and business loans
Mortgage shoppers wanting guidance from experienced local loan officers
Customers prioritizing cybersecurity and identity theft protection integration
diagnosis: Bank of Travelers Rest is best for South Carolina residents and small business owners seeking personalized community banking with modern digital capabilities. The main caveat is that as a regional institution, they may have less competitive rates and higher fees than national banks, and service is geographically limited outside South Carolina.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
